name: The Love Nest
sourceStatus: Public Airbnb result found May 26, 2026; host-approved photos still needed
title: A cosy penthouse made for two by the sea.
tagline: The intimate Ostend hideaway for rest, romance, and reconnection.
description: The Love Nest is the most clearly Airbnb-ready addition found in public search: a cosy Ostend penthouse for two, close to the beach, with terraces, outdoor bathing, and Laurens listed as a co-host.

listingHighlights.label: Beach proximity
listingHighlights.value: Airbnb describes the penthouse as a stone's throw from the beach and within walking distance of the station.

listingHighlights.label: Outdoor terraces
listingHighlights.value: The public listing mentions two large wooden terraces, side sea view, outdoor pool, outdoor shower, sun loungers, and electric BBQ.

listingHighlights.label: Self check-in
listingHighlights.value: Guests can check in with a lockbox, which makes arrival easy to explain in Amigo.

stayStory.title: The stay
stayStory.text: The Love Nest is the collection's intimate Ostend page: compact, romantic, and easy to understand for two guests.

stayStory.title: The Airbnb proof
stayStory.text: Public Airbnb data points to a high-rating penthouse with strong review proof, beach access, and outdoor terrace life.

stayStory.title: The atmosphere
stayStory.text: This page should lean into evening, terraces, sea air, and the private feeling of a small hideaway.

stayStory.title: The handoff
stayStory.text: The site can guide the guest, but live dates, payment, cancellation, and messaging stay on Airbnb.

bookingSteps: Use Airbnb to confirm live price and availability.
Keep the booking, cancellation policy, payment, and host messaging on Airbnb.
Confirm with Maaike & Laurens whether this listing is part of the final House of Wander collection.
Only import photos after owner approval.
houseNotes: Carbon monoxide alarm not reported; smoke alarm listed.
Photos remain placeholders until owner-approved assets are supplied.
locationNote: The public Airbnb listing places The Love Nest in central Ostend, close to the beach, the station, shops, cafes, bars, and restaurants.
sourceNotes: Public Airbnb search result found for Airbnb room 1025111265786397251.
Airbnb-hosted photos were not copied into this repo.
Final inclusion in the House of Wander collection should be confirmed by Maaike & Laurens.

amigoStayPlan.title: Fit guide
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo can explain that this is the romantic two-person coastal option.

amigoStayPlan.title: Trust guide
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo can summarize the public Airbnb rating, review themes, check-in, and host/co-host structure.

amigoStayPlan.title: Booking guardrail
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo keeps price, availability, cancellation, and payment on Airbnb.

amigoPrompts.label: Who is The Love Nest for?
amigoPrompts.answer: The Love Nest is best framed as the intimate Ostend option for two guests: beach nearby, terraces, outdoor bathing, and a high public Airbnb rating. Live dates and price still need Airbnb confirmation.

amigoPrompts.label: Can I see photos?
amigoPrompts.answer: The public Airbnb page has photos, but this prototype does not copy Airbnb-hosted images. The team should provide owner-approved images before the House of Wander page uses them.

amigoPrompts.label: How does booking work?
amigoPrompts.answer: House of Wander can guide the decision, but Airbnb should handle live dates, price, cancellation, payment, and messaging for now.
